roa.docketEntryComment: Order of Victim Restitution or CR-110 & Abstract of Judgment for Restitution (CR-111)
Jurisdictional Transfer Packet Sent To Alameda County
CONFIDENTIAL APD Motion to Transfer Out to Other County
DATE OF 05-13-21 VACATED & CONTINUED TO 06-24-21 BY STIPULATION

/CAL: SERVICE OF CR-110/DEF: ACCEPT THE RESTITUTION AMOUNT SET FORTH IN THE CR-110/CTORD: RESTITUTION SET IN THE AMOUNT OG $16,832,40 PLUS INTEREST10% PER YEAR FROM THE DATE OF SENTENCING,/REST: $16,832,40/X: CR-110 ANDCR-111 SIGNED AND FILED/DEF: TO CONTINUE ON PROBZTION/CCU/

/CAL:SENTENCE/AJW/X:AS TO COUNT 1, DEFENDANT IS SENTENCED AS FOLLOWS:/CH1:ISS:PROB 2 Y:PJ 1 Y/CTS:6/X:AS TO COUNT 2, DEFENDANT IS SENTENCED AS FOLLOWS:/CH2:ISS:PROB 2 Y:PJ 1 Y/CTS:6/CC/X:AS TO COUNT 3, DEFENDANT IS SENTENCED AS FOLLOWS:/CH3:ISS:PROB 2 Y:PJ 1 Y/CTS:6/CC/X:AS TO COUNT 4, DEFENDANT IS SENTENCED AS FOLLOWS:/CH4:ISS:PROB 2 Y:PJ 1 Y/CTS:6/CC/DNACOMP/PPRFCOMP/IND/WS/VF4:300/COA:40/ICNA/SUSFF/X:APD HAS DETERMINED THAT RESTITUTION IS OWED,/X:CR-110 ORDER FOR VICTIM RESTITUTION IN THE AMOUNT OF $16,832,40 TO STEVEN MARTINEZ AND CR-111 ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT FOR RESTITUTION ARESIGNED AND FILED IN COURT TO BE SERVED ON THE DEFENDANT ON 02-24-22,//COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/4019HALF/BE/SHER/CONTD:SERVICE OF STAY AWAY ORDER & CR-110
/CAL: DISPOSITION/TWS/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF G/DEFT ADV RTS:   001, 002, 003, 004/FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/PRES: 01-13-21/PPRFCUST/ARBUCKLE/
/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/CON:MURRAY ZISHOLZ/FAW/DEFTARR/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/GTW/987,2/CONTD: PRETRIAL CONFERENCE AND TO SET TRIAL/DOP/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/WIT SWORN:JONATHAN ELDEN/EXHM:PEOPLE'S 1 - CD JACKET/EXHMA:PEOPLE'S 1A - VIDEO FILE/EXHMA:PEOPLE'S 2 - PHOTO/EXHMA:PEOPLE'S 3 - PHOTO/WIT SWORN:STEVEN MARTINEZ/EXHMA:PEOPLE'S 4 - PHOTO/WIT SWORN:SFPD SGT, CONROY TAM/EXHMA:PEOPLE'S 5 - SUBPOENAED S,F, FIRE DEPT RECORDS/EXHMA:PEOPLE'S 6 - SUBPOENAED S,F, GENERAL HOSPITAL RECORDS/EXHMA:PEOPLE'S 7 - SUBPOENAED PRESIDIO SURGERY CENTER RECORDS/HTA1:1, 2 AND 3/CONTD:ARRAIGNMENT IN D22/DOP/X:EXHIBITS MARKED AND ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE ARE ORDERED RETURNED TO THE OFFERING PARTY PENDING FURTHER ORDER OF COURT,/
/CAL:TO SET/X:THE COURT RELEIVES CHRISTOPHER DOVE AS COUNSEL FOR DEFENDANT,/CON:MURRAY ZISHOLZ/X:THE PARTIES ARE NOT YET READY TO SET PRELIMINARY HEARING,/CONTD:PREHEARING CONFERENCE IN D12/DOP/

/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT/CON: CHRISTOPHER DOVE/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OFALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/NTW60/LDPX: 09-25-17/987,2/BAIL: 85000/SA2: STEVEN MARTINEZ, JONATHAN ELDEN/SAORD4: 150 YARDS/CONTD: PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DOP/TE: ONE HALF DAY/
/CAL:SERVICE OF STAY AWAY ORDER & CR-110/SAORD/SA1:STEVEN MARTINEZ & JONATHAN ELDEN/SAORD3/CONTD:SERVICE OF CR-110/DOP/
/CAL: DISPO/X: THE COURT RELIEVES NEIL HALLINAN AS COUNSEL AND REAPPOINTSMURRAY ZISHOLZ/CON:MURRAY ZISHOLZ/CONT/DOP/
/CAL:DISPOSITION/X:ATTORNEY MURRAY ZISHOLZ IS RELIEVED AS COUNSEL OF RECORD/CON:NIEL HALLINAN/CONT/DOP/
/CAL:DISPOSITION/X:STEVEN MARTINEZ MAKES VICTIM IMPACT STATEMENT IN COURT,/CONT/DOP/
/CAL:TO SET JURY TRIAL/CONTD:DISPO IN DEPT, 23 & TO SET JURY TRIAL IN DEPT, 22/DOP/
/CAL:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE/CONTD:TO SET JURY TRIAL IN DEPT 22/DOP/
/CAL:TO SET JURY TRIAL/CONTD:PHC IN DEPT, 23 & TO SET JURY TRIAL IN DEPT,22/DAWF/
/CAL: TO SET JURY TRIAL/CONTD: PRE TRIAL CONFERENCE IN S23/CONTD: TO SETJURY TRIAL IN S22/DOP/
